title: The Gay Caballero
writer: Tom Gill, Barry Conners, Philip Klein
actors: George O'Brien, Victor McLaglen, Conchita Montenegro
plot: Football star Ted Radcliffe goes west to manage an inherited cattle ranch. Empire builder and cattle thief Don Paco is hounded by El Coyote (who is really Don Bob) who now has a partner in Ted. Unfortunately Ted is also falling lo...
